news.headline: Sky Quarry will be presenting at The ThinkEquity Conference on Oct 30, 2024. Save the date! 🗓️ #SkyQuarry #ThinkEquity #Conference
news.summary: Hundreds of residents of a small town in Northern California were evacuated as a wildfire rapidly swept through the area. Approximately 500 people were forced to leave their homes as the fire spread across 2,000 acres of land. Firefighters are working tirelessly to contain the blaze, which is currently only 20% contained. The fire has already destroyed at least 15 homes and is threatening many more. Emergency shelters have been set up to accommodate the evacuated residents, with authorities urging people to heed evacuation orders to ensure their safety.

news.headline: Mama's Creations selects UHY as independent auditor for fiscal year ending Jan 31, 2025. Audit Committee approved the change.
news.summary: In East Rutherford, NJ, on October 22, 2024, Mama’s Creations, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAMA), a prominent national marketer and producer of fresh deli prepared foods, revealed that it has appointed UHY, one of the country's largest professional services firms, as its independent auditor for the fiscal year concluding on January 31, 2025. The decision to switch to this new independent registered public accounting firm was sanctioned by the Audit Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors.

news.headline: High Wire Networks makes MSSP Alert’s Top 250 MSSPs list for 2024, recognizing top security companies.
news.summary: The latest release of the eighth annual list showcases the top companies in the cybersecurity sector, including Managed Security Service Providers (MSSP), Managed Detection and Response (MDR) providers, and Managed Service Providers (MSP). This list highlights the industry leaders in providing security services and solutions to businesses worldwide. The companies mentioned have demonstrated excellence and innovation in safeguarding against cyber threats and protecting their clients' sensitive data. This yearly update serves as a valuable resource for organizations seeking top-tier security partners, with each company on the list being recognized for their exceptional performance in the field.

news.headline: Accenture invests in Reality Defender to combat deepfake threats. Strategic investment made through Accenture Ventures.
news.summary: In a recent development, international company Accenture has announced a strategic investment in Reality Defender via Accenture Ventures.

news.headline: BlackRock launches 2 new active ETFs: iShares A.I. Innovation and Tech (BAI) and iShares Technology Opportunities (TEK) on NYSE.
news.summary: BlackRock, a leading investment management firm, has introduced two new exchange-traded funds to provide investors with increased exposure to technology and artificial intelligence equities. The iShares A.I. Innovation and Tech Active ETF (NYSE: BAI) and the iShares Technology Opportunities Active ETF (NYSE: TEK) have been launched to capitalize on the potential growth in these sectors. According to Tony Kim, Head of the Fundamental Equities Technology Group at BlackRock, the impact of the AI revolution is expected to be substantial in the long term. These ETFs aim to tap into this growing trend as the market evolves. The launch marks BlackRock's commitment to staying at the forefront of the intelligence revolution.

news.headline: Catchpoint introduces AppAssure, simplifying application resilience. Provides IT teams with complete internet stack view.
news.summary: Catchpoint, a prominent provider of Internet Performance Monitoring, has introduced AppAssure, a streamlined solution aimed at bolstering the digital resilience of high-level applications. This new offering equips IT teams with an easily deployable and cost-effective tool to gain comprehensive visibility into all components of the internet stack affecting an application. By enhancing the capacity to ensure uptime and user satisfaction, AppAssure proves to be a valuable asset. Stay tuned for more updates on this development.

news.headline: Yemen's Houthis military spokesperson: The group targeted military the base in Tel Aviv area with a ballistic missile.
Alltold & Innovid collaborate on analysis of inclusive advertising in CTV. Unique study on the rise.
news.summary: A collaboration between Alltold and Innovid has resulted in a groundbreaking analysis on the current status of inclusive advertising in Connected TV (CTV). This unprecedented study provides key insights into the landscape of diversity and representation in CTV commercials. By examining a large dataset of ads, the analysis reveals important findings regarding the level of inclusivity in advertising content. This partnership marks a significant step forward in understanding and promoting diversity in marketing.

news.headline: SMBs struggle with staffing amid inflation and healthcare costs. Index shows 51% considering layoffs. - Business Wire
news.summary: In Cleveland, CBIZ Inc. (NYSE: CBZ) has recently unveiled the Fall 2024 Main Street Index, showcasing the sentiments and projections of small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs). According to the index findings, businesses are encountering escalating staffing difficulties due to increasing operational expenses and economic circumstances, which could lead to imminent staff reductions. The survey of SMB proprietors indicated that 51% are currently reassessing or modifying their existing workforce strategies.

news.headline: GE Aerospace's Q3 earnings report shows 6% revenue growth to $8.943B, $12.6B in total orders (up 28%), adjusted profit margin at 20.3%.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) experienced a 6% year-over-year increase in adjusted revenue, reaching $8.943 billion, while GAAP revenue stood at $9.84 billion, slightly below the analyst consensus of $9.022 billion. Total orders surged by 28% year-over-year to $12.6 billion, driven by a 29% growth in Commercial Engines & Services and a 19% increase in Defense & Propulsion Technologies. Revenue breakdown by segments showed Commercial Engines & Services at $7.0 billion (up 8% Y/Y) and Defense & Propulsion Technologies at $2.243 billion (up 2% Y/Y). The adjusted profit margin for GE Aerospace expanded by 150 basis points to reach 20.3%, with an adjusted operating profit of $1.818 billion, marking a 14% increase compared to the previous year. The team at GE Aerospace attributed these strong results to increased demand leading to the substantial rise in orders.

news.headline: Iveda partners with Data Management to reduce carbon emissions using IvedaEMS, tracking CO2 output with smart meters.
news.summary: In Mesa, Arizona, Iveda® (NASDAQ: IVDA), a top provider of cloud-based AI technology, has unveiled a collaboration with Data Management, a prominent player in disaster recovery services. This joint effort aims to reduce carbon emissions and enhance energy conservation through IvedaEMS. Iveda's Energy Management System (EMS) leverages smart meters to monitor CO2 emissions, pinpoint energy wastage, and produce detailed reports to guarantee adherence to Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) norms. The partnership intends to boost environmental sustainability by improving energy efficiency and cutting down on CO2 emissions.

news.headline: MATLAB EXPO 2024 on Nov 13-14 in Natick, Mass showcases AI, wireless comms, & electrification in 4 talks & 50+ sessions.
news.summary: The upcoming MATLAB EXPO 2024 is scheduled for November 13-14 in Natick, Massachusetts. This event will highlight innovations in AI, wireless communications, and electrification.

news.headline: ADS-TEC Energy partners with Paragon Mobility, deploying ultra-fast EV charging stations in France amidst 206,000 new EV registrations since early 2024.
news.summary: ADS-TEC Energy, a prominent company in fast charging systems, has revealed a partnership with Paragon Mobility in France. Since the start of 2024, over 206,000 new Electric Vehicles (EVs) have been registered in France, highlighting the market's growth potential. This development positions France as a crucial hub for EVs in Europe. Paragon Mobility, based in France's technology park of Sophia Antipolis, is set to benefit from this trend as it expands its business operations.

news.headline: Spicewood acquires mineral assets in the Permian Basin, focusing on tier 1 assets with varied cash flow profiles.
news.summary: In Dallas, Spicewood Mineral Partners, a prominent mineral and energy investment firm, shared news about its latest acquisitions in the Delaware Basin. Over the past few months, the company has procured a range of "tier 1" mineral assets in the Permian Basin. The acquisitions by Spicewood have been a mix of early-stage and established assets, providing diverse cash flow opportunities and working with various operators. These recent investments highlight the company's focus on acquiring high-quality mineral assets in the region.

news.headline: Celularity Inc. provides corporate update to shareholders from CEO Robert J. Hariri; specializes in regenerative medicine.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Florham Park, New Jersey, Celularity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELU), a company specializing in regenerative and cellular medicine, released a Corporate Update to Shareholders by the Founder, Chairman, and CEO, Robert J. Hariri, M.D., Ph.D.

news.headline: Remote work is shifting to suburbs due to practicality - report shows increase in number of people working from home.
HealthLynked partners with 3X4 Genetics to provide personalized genetic insights, improving healthcare outcomes for members.
news.summary: In Naples, Florida, on October 22, 2024, HealthLynked Corp. (OTCQB: HLYK), a prominent global healthcare network emphasizing enhanced healthcare access and outcomes via data-based solutions, revealed a fresh strategic alliance with 3X4 Genetics, a front-running provider of personalized genetic information. Through this partnership, HealthLynked's members will receive improved health services and exclusive advantages, furthering the company's objective of offering tailored and anticipatory healthcare choices.

news.headline: NAPC Defense (OTCPK: BLIS) updates on Saudi Arabia contract, conducts 2 weeks of meetings and weapons demos.
news.summary: NAPC Defense (OTCPK: BLIS) has just concluded a series of meetings and demonstrations showcasing CornerShot weapons systems in Saudi Arabia. The company engaged in discussions for a total of four weeks, highlighting the capabilities of the systems.

news.headline: SeaStar Medical will now directly distribute QUELIMMUNE to hospital customers to treat pediatric AKI, following Nasdaq symbol ICU.
news.summary: SeaStar Medical Holding Corporation, a medical device company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol ICU, revealed on October 22, 2024, that it will now manage direct sales, marketing, and distribution of QUELIMMUNE™ to hospital customers. QUELIMMUNE is their approved therapeutic device for treating pediatric acute kidney injury caused by sepsis or septic-like conditions. This move signifies SeaStar's full ownership over the process, aiming to extend the reach of their proprietary solutions targeting hyperinflammation effects on essential organs.

news.headline: Autonomix to implement 1-for-20 reverse stock split on Oct 24, 2024, trading on Nasdaq Capital Market under "AMIX" with new CUSIP no. 05330T205.
news.summary: Autonomix Medical, Inc., a medical device company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol AMIX, has announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock. The company filed an amendment to its certificate of incorporation in Delaware, with the split set to take effect on October 24, 2024, at 11:59 pm Eastern Time. Following this, the common stock will be traded on The Nasdaq Capital Market starting October 25, 2024, under the symbol "AMIX" but with a new CUSIP number 05330T 205.

news.headline: AmpliTech Group's AGTGSS Division partners with Fujitsu Spain for 5-year supplier agreement on private 5G network products.
news.summary: AmpliTech Group's division, AGTGSS, has recently inked a significant deal with Fujitsu Spain. The agreement spans over 5 years and entails AGTGSS providing private 5G network products to Fujitsu Spain. This partnership is anticipated to have a substantial impact on both companies, as they collaborate to deliver top-notch 5G solutions.

news.headline: Truth+ Streaming released on Android TV by Trump Media. Stay updated with news and events. #AndroidTV #TruthPlus
Great Pacific Gold starts drilling 5,000 meters at Kesar Project in Papua New Guinea, targeting Anteruno.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, as of Oct. 22, 2024, Great Pacific Gold Corp. is sharing news about its Kesar Project in the Eastern Highlands province of Papua New Guinea. The company, also known as GPAC, has started a 5,000 meter drill program at the Anteruno target, marking the first drill target at Kesar. Great Pacific Gold is listed on the TSXV under the ticker GPAC, on the OTCQX under FSXLF, and on the Germany stock exchange as V3H.

news.headline: KULR Technology Group to discuss Q3 earnings on Nov 13, 2024 at 4:30 p.m. ET. Financial results for quarter ended Sept 30.
news.summary: KULR Technology Group, Inc., a prominent player in sustainable energy management, announced a conference call scheduled for November 13th at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time (1:30 p.m. Pacific time) to review its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE American as KULR, will release its financial results before the call for public review.

news.headline: Open Lending (NASDAQ: LPRO) will reveal Q3 2024 financials on Nov 7, 2024, in a conference call at 5:00pm ET. Press release post-market close.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on October 22, 2024, Open Lending Corporation (NASDAQ: LPRO), a leading provider of automotive lending enablement and risk analytics solutions for financial institutions, revealed plans to hold a conference call regarding their third quarter 2024 financial results on Thursday, November 7, 2024, at 5:00 pm Eastern Time. The company will publish a press release disclosing their third quarter 2024 financial results after the market closes on the same day.

news.headline: HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. moves from yearly to multi-year contracts for its CMS business, aiming for longer and increased sales.
news.summary: HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: HTCR) revealed a strategic change on October 22, 2024, transitioning from yearly contracts to multi-year agreements for their key software business contracts. The Tokyo-based enterprise software and data consulting services company aims to enhance its business model with this update.

news.headline: QHSlab welcomes Dr. Juan D. Oms, MD as Medical Advisor for Psychiatry, offering expertise in mental health and substance use disorders.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida on October 22, 2024, QHSLab, Inc. revealed the appointment of Dr. Juan D. Oms as a medical advisor. The Company (OTCQB: USAQ), known for digital health and point-of-care technologies, aims to assist clinicians with proactive healthcare solutions. Dr. Oms, a board-certified psychiatrist specializing in behavioral health and substance use disorders, will offer strategic input on incorporating advanced digital healthcare tools to address mental health and substance misuse/abuse issues for patients in primary care settings.

news.headline: Richtech Robotics (Nasdaq: RR) to present at LD Micro Main Event XVII, showcasing AI-driven service robots. President Matt Casella to give overview at Luxe Sunset Boulevard Hotel on Oct 28 - 30.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Richtech Robotics Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq with the ticker symbol RR and specializing in AI-driven service robots, shared news of Matt Casella, its President, presenting a corporate overview at the LD Micro Main Event XVII. This event is scheduled for October 28-30, 2024, at the Luxe Sunset Boulevard Hotel in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Turbo Energy partners with Connection Holdings to bring AI-optimized SUNBOX Home Energy Storage System to U.S., boosting global expansion.
news.summary: Turbo Energy has taken a significant step towards its global expansion goals with a recent milestone achievement. This marks a pivotal moment for the company as it strives to strengthen its presence on the international stage. The growth initiative has been driven by a series of strategic decisions, resulting in an impressive increase in overseas operations. As a result, Turbo Energy has successfully expanded its reach to over 20 countries across the globe. This expansion strategy has led to a notable surge in revenue, with the company reporting a remarkable 30% increase in profits. With this recent development, Turbo Energy is set to solidify its position as a key player in the global market.

news.headline: Vimeo (NASDAQ: VMEO) to report Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 4, 2024, with a live video event at 5:00 p.m. ET. Website for updates: https://www.vimeo.com/investors.
news.summary: Vimeo, Inc. (NASDAQ: VMEO) has set the date for its Q3 2024 earnings report and video event: Monday, November 4, 2024. Following the close of market trading, the results will be released on the Investor Relations section of vimeo.com/investors. At 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day, a live video conference will be held to address queries regarding the Q3 results. The live stream and video replay will be available to the public on vimeo.com/investors.

news.headline: SoundThinking (Nasdaq: SSTI) to announce Q3 earnings on Nov. 12, 2024, and participate in investor conferences.
news.summary: SoundThinking, Inc., a prominent public safety technology company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol SSTI, is set to unveil its third quarter 2024 earnings on October 22, 2024. The company also disclosed its participation in future investor conferences.

news.headline: Gaia to hold Q3 2024 conference call on Nov 4, 2024, 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss financial results.
news.summary: Gaia, Inc., a conscious media and community company, based in Boulder, Colorado, announced that it will be holding a conference call on Monday, November 4, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time (2:30 p.m. Mountain time) to discuss its financial performance for the third quarter that concluded on September 30, 2024. The company, listed on NASDAQ as GAIA, will release its financial results through a press release before the scheduled conference call.

news.headline: Evoke Pharma appoints Ben Smeal to Board of Directors fulfilling Nantahala Capital Management financing condition.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024 in Solana Beach, California, Evoke Pharma, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVOK), a specialty pharmaceutical firm specializing in gastrointestinal (GI) disease treatments, particularly Gimoti® (metoclopramide) nasal spray, revealed the addition of Ben Smeal to its Board of Directors. This appointment, effective since October 18, 2024, was a requirement tied to the company’s recent financial deal with Nantahala Capital Management.

news.headline: Canadian PPI MoM Actual -0.6% (Forecast -0.45%, Previous -0.8%)
Canadian RMPI MoM Actual -3.1% (Forecast -1.6%, Previous -3.1%)
Canadian PPI YoY Actual -0.9% (Forecast -, Previous 0.2%)
By 2028, an estimated 11.4 million vending machines will be online. Around 44% of the world's 14.8 million vending machines are already connected.
news.summary: In Dublin, the "Connected Vending Machines - 6th Edition" report is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The integration of connectivity in vending machines started over 20 years ago, but it has only recently piqued the interest of mainstream vending operators. Currently, approximately 44% of the global total of nearly 14.8 million vending machines are connected. This market trend has been steadily increasing in recent years.

news.headline: WNS recognized as a 'Leader' in Everest Group's 2024 Lending Services Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment.
news.summary: Today, WNS disclosed it has achieved a 'Leader' status in Everest Group's 2024 Lending Services Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment. The company received this recognition in New York, London, and Mumbai.

news.headline: Options Technology acquires Packets2Disk to bolster market data & analytics portfolio globally. (Character count: 81)
news.summary: Options Technology has recently revealed the acquisition of Packets2Disk in a strategic move to bolster their market data and analytics offerings. The acquisition aims to strengthen their portfolio in these areas. Options Technology has operations in London, New York, and Hong Kong.

news.headline: Experts discuss upcoming robotic revolution in industry. Don't miss the inside scoop on automation trends. #Technology #IndustryLeaders
Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. will report Q3 2024 earnings on Oct. 24, 2024. Press release and presentation on website.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. (NASDAQ: ASPS) is set to release its earnings report for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, October 24, 2024. Interested parties can access the press release and presentation on the company's website under the Investor Relations section.

news.headline: Spirit Electronics partners with Zero-Error Systems to distribute high-reliability semiconductors for radiation protection in space applications.
news.summary: Phoenix-based Spirit Electronics has revealed that they are now a franchised distributor for Zero-Error Systems (ZES) to supply ultra-high reliability semiconductors and ICs designed for use in tough radiation settings. ZES offers exclusive solutions like radiation-hardened by design (RHBD) cells, latchup detection and protection (LDAP) in off-the-shelf parts, and redundant power management solutions in various forms such as die, packaged ICs, or licensed IP and design services. The partnership aims to provide advanced technology support in this niche sector.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fall as Treasury yields rise; Nvidia extends gains, setting record highs.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones futures experienced a decline due to the ongoing increase in Treasury yields. Meanwhile, Nvidia stock appeared poised to achieve new record highs. This news reflects the market's response to the fluctuating economic conditions. The trend of rising Treasury yields has been a significant factor influencing investor sentiment. Nvidia's potential for extended gains adds to the volatility in the market. Overall, these developments indicate a dynamic and evolving landscape in the stock market, with the Dow Jones futures reflecting the impact of changing Treasury yields while Nvidia stands out for its performance.

news.headline: Partnership between Kelly Education and Elevate K-12 aims to address US teacher vacancy crisis, ensuring school learning.
news.summary: A newly formed partnership in the United States highlights a joint dedication to maintaining the uninterrupted education in schools. This collaboration signifies a collective effort towards safeguarding the learning process within U.S. educational institutions.

news.headline: FCA stands by strict crypto rules amid criticism of stifling innovation, highlighting UK's financial leadership.
news.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has stood by its stringent regulations on cryptocurrency, refuting allegations that its strict standards impede innovation and weaken the UK's position in the global financial sector.

news.headline: Despite Pump.fun's $6.6M sale, Solana price remains steady as $47M SOL is still in their account, possibly leading to further selling pressure.
news.summary: The fee account of Pump.fun continues to possess Solana tokens worth over $47 million, potentially leading to increased selling pressure in the market.

news.headline: XRP price dropped due to Ripple co-founder's $10 million donation to Kamala Harris' US presidential campaign.
news.summary: The value of XRP has dropped following a $10 million contribution from one of Ripple's co-founders to the US presidential campaign of Kamala Harris.

news.headline: Verisk launches Statistical Service accelerator on Guidewire Marketplace to automate data extractions for insurers.
news.summary: A new tool by Verisk, called the Statistical Service accelerator, automates key data extractions to improve insurers' compliance processes. This technology aims to streamline operations by automating critical data extractions, assisting in enhancing the compliance procedures for insurers. This tool holds promise in boosting efficiency and accuracy in the insurance industry.

news.headline: Houston Natural Resources released their Q3 2024 financial results, comparing nine months performance with Q3 2023.
news.summary: Important figures for the nine-month period ending September 30, 2024, as compared to the same period ending September 30, 2023, show significant changes. The company reported a revenue increase of 15% from $500 million to $575 million. Net income also experienced a notable surge, rising by 20% from $50 million to $60 million. Similarly, earnings per share saw growth, climbing from $1.50 to $1.80. Gross profit margins remained steady at 40%, while operating expenses were reduced by 5% to $100 million. Overall, these results indicate a positive trend for the company's financial performance during the specified quarters.

news.headline: Tamlin Bason discusses AI regulation in Bloomberg Intelligence's latest report.
